    exact tendsto_const_nhds
  · have h1 : (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) = (fun x => r * (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x))) := by
      ext x
      field_simp
      ring
    rw [h1]
    have h2 : Tendsto (fun x => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
      apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within
      · exact tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds (by continuity)
      · filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with x hx
        simp only [Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        exact mul_ne_zero hr hx
    have h3 : Tendsto (fun u => Real.sinh u / u) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) :=
      Real.tendsto_sinh_div_self.mono_left nhdsWithin_le_nhds
    have h4 : Tendsto (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h3.comp h2
    convert Tendsto.const_mul r h4
    ring

simp only [hr, zero_mul, Real.sinh_zero, zero_div]
    exact tendsto_const_nhds
  · have h1 : (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) = (fun x => r * (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x))) := by
      ext x
      field_simp
      ring
    rw [h1]
    have h2 : Tendsto (fun x => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
      apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within
      · exact tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds (by continuity)
      · filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with x hx
        simp only [Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx ⊢
        exact mul_ne_zero hr hx
    have h3 : Tendsto (fun y => Real.sinh y / y) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
      exact Real.tendsto_sinh_div_self
    have h4 : Tendsto (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) :=
      h3.comp h2
    convert Tendsto.const_mul r h4 using 1
    simp

simp only [hr, zero_mul, Real.sinh_zero, zero_div]
    exact tendsto_const_nhds
  · have h1 : (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) = (fun x => r * (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x))) := by
      ext x
      field_simp
      ring
    rw [h1]
    have h2 : Tendsto (fun x => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
      apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within
      · exact tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds (by continuity)
      · filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with x hx
        simp only [Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        exact mul_ne_zero hr hx
    have h3 : Tendsto (fun u => Real.sinh u / u) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
      exact Real.tendsto_sinh_div_self
    have h4 : Tendsto (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
      exact h3.comp h2
    exact tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds tendsto_const_nhds |>.mul h4 |>.congr (by simp)

simp only [hr, zero_mul, Real.sinh_zero, zero_div]
    exact tendsto_const_nhds
  · have h : ∀ x ≠ 0, Real.sinh (r * x) / x = r * (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) := by
      intros x hx; field_simp; ring
    refine Tendsto.congr' ?_ (tendsto_const_nhds.mul ?_)
    · filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with x hx using (h x hx).symm
    · exact Real.tendsto_sinh_div_self.comp (tendsto_id.mul_const r |>.mono_left nhdsWithin_le_nhds |>.mono_left (nhdsWithin_mono 0 (by simp)))

simp only [hr, zero_mul, Real.sinh_zero, zero_div]
    exact tendsto_const_nhds
  · have h1 : (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) = (fun x => r * (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x))) := by

      · exact tendsto_const_nhds.mul tendsto_id |>.mono_left nhdsWithin_le_nhds
      · filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with x hx
        simp only [Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        exact mul_ne_zero hr hx
    have h3 : Tendsto (fun u => Real.sinh u / u) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) :=

    convert Tendsto.const_mul r h4 using 1
    ring

simp only [hr, zero_mul, Real.sinh_zero, zero_div]
    exact tendsto_const_nhds
  · have h1 : (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) = (fun x => r * (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x))) := by
      ext x
      field_simp
      ring
    rw [h1]
    have h2 : Tendsto (fun x => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
      apply Tendsto.inf
      · exact (continuous_mul_left r).tendsto 0 |>.comp tendsto_id |> by simp
      · rw [tendsto_principal_principal]
        intro x hx
        simp only [Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx ⊢
        exact mul_ne_zero hr hx
    have h3 : Tendsto (fun u => Real.sinh u / u) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := Real.tendsto_sinh_div_self
    have h4 : Tendsto (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h3.comp h2
    exact (tendsto_const_nhds.mul h4).congr (by simp)

simp only [hr, zero_mul, Real.sinh_zero, zero_div]
    exact tendsto_const_nhds
  · have h1 : (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) = (fun x => r * (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x))) := by
      ext x
      field_simp
      ring
    rw [h1]
    have h2 : Tendsto (fun x => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
      apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within
      · exact tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds (by continuity)
      · filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with x hx
        simp only [Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        exact mul_ne_zero hr hx
    have h3 : Tendsto (fun y => Real.sinh y / y) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) :=
      Real.tendsto_sinh_div_self.mono_left nhdsWithin_le_nhds
    have h4 : Tendsto (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h3.comp h2
    convert h4.const_mul r using 1
    simp
